flashcards.definition: A financial plan allocating income to expenses, savings, and investments over a specific period.
Budget guideline: 50% needs, 30% wants, 20% savings and debt repayment.
Budget where every dollar of income is assigned a specific purpose (income minus all allocations = $0).
Costs that stay the same each period: rent/mortgage, car payment, insurance premiums.
Costs that fluctuate: groceries, utilities, entertainment, clothing.
